name: PATENT_APPLICATION_YEARS_BY_TARGET
description: Patent application years by target. Auto-generated from the core-four benchmark and aligned to the validated query-frame Cypher semantics.
cypher:
MATCH (t:Target {symbol: $target})<-[:HAS_TARGET]-(tp:TargetPair)<-[:HAS_TARGET_PAIR]-(p:Patent)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(y:Year)
RETURN y.year AS year, count(DISTINCT p) AS patent_count
ORDER BY year ASC

examples: In which years were patents involving HLA-G filed?
In which years were patents involving TGFBR1 filed?
In which years were patents involving ITGAM filed?
